error_signature: <file>:<n>: error: cannot override localparam `acc_width` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`. <file>:<n>: error: cannot override localparam `coeff_frac_bits` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`. <file>:<n>: error: cannot override localparam `coeff_width` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`. <file>:<n>: error: cannot override localparam `data_width` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`. <file>:<n>: error: parameter `order` not found in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`. <file>:<n>: error: cannot override localparam `taps` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`. <n> error(s) during elaboration
raw_error_example:
output/test_filter.sv:155: error: Cannot override localparam `ACC_WIDTH` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`.
output/test_filter.sv:157: error: Cannot override localparam `COEFF_FRAC_BITS` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`.
output/test_filter.sv:156: error: Cannot override localparam `COEFF_WIDTH` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`.
output/test_filter.sv:154: error: Cannot override localparam `DATA_WIDTH` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`.
output/test_filter.sv:159: error: parameter `ORDER` not found in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`.
output/test_filter.sv:158: error: Cannot override localparam `TAPS` in `output_test_filter.dut_inst`.
7 error(s) during elaboration.
root_cause: The testbench module incorrectly attempted to override parameters of the DUT using localparam instead of parameter, and passed undefined localparam ORDER.
fix_rule: Declare all DUT parameters as `parameter` in the testbench, not `localparam`, and ensure only parameters defined in the DUT module are overridden—remove any stray parameter like ORDER that does not exist in the DUT.
